name_cn:
DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Large Pink]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth quilting. The spacious interior features a pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather strap closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The large size features a leather handle with adjustable details for carrying as a handbag or shoulder bag.
CD Lock and strap closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2820
Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm
Handle Length: 14 - 29 cm. 000820
